papers.title_en: A Novel Radiomics-Integrated Panel for Preoperative Stratification of Pancreatic Neuroendocrine Tumors (PNETs)
papers.tldr: Multiple Sclerosis (MS) is a chronicdegenerative disorder that significantly affects the quality of life of patients. MagneticResonance Imaging (MRI) has become essential for diagnosis, monitoring, and …。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Background and Objective: Multiple Sclerosis (MS) is a chronicdegenerative disorder that significantly affects the quality of life of patients. MagneticResonance Imaging (MRI) has become essential for diagnosis, monitoring, and …

papers.title_en: AI and radiomics for improving the medical workflow for Multiple Sclerosis
papers.tldr: 多发性硬化症（MS）是一种严重影响患者生活质量的慢性退行性疾病，磁共振成像（MRI）在其诊疗中至关重要。本文探讨了人工智能（AI）与影像组学技术在优化MS医疗工作流中的应用，旨在通过自动化分析提升诊断准确性、病情监测效率及预后评估能力，为临床决策提供更精准的数据支持，从而改善患者的长期管理效果。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Background and Objective: Multiple Sclerosis (MS) is a chronicdegenerative disorder that significantly affects the quality of life of patients. MagneticResonance Imaging (MRI) has become essential for diagnosis, monitoring, and …

papers.title_en: A multimodal MRI radiomics model for distinguishing borderline from malignant ovarian epithelial tumors
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在开发并验证一种基于多模态MRI影像组学的机器学习模型，用于区分交界性卵巢上皮肿瘤（BEOTs）与恶性卵巢上皮肿瘤（MEOTs）。通过对147名患者的影像数据进行特征提取与建模，该研究提供了一种无创且高效的术前鉴别诊断方法，有助于临床医生制定更精准的治疗策略。
papers.abstract_en: Background To develop and validate a multimodal MRI radiomics machine learningmodel for differentiating borderline epithelial ovarian tumors (BEOTs) from malignantepithelial ovarian tumors (MEOTs). Methods A total of 147 patients (72 with BEOTs …

papers.title_en: CT-based radiomics improves survival prediction in colorectal liver metastases: beyond clinical scores
papers.tldr: 本研究针对结直肠癌肝转移（CRLM）术后生存预测准确性不足的问题，提出了一种基于CT影像组学的方法。通过提取CT图像中的定量特征并结合传统临床评分，研究者开发了新的预后模型。结果表明，该模型在生存预测效能上显著超越了现有临床标准，为临床医生筛选手术候选者和制定个体化治疗方案提供了更可靠的决策支持。
papers.abstract_en: Surgery with perioperative chemotherapy offers a potentially curative treatment forcolorectal liver metastases (CRLM). Selection of candidates for resection relies onsurvival prediction, but available prognostic factors have limited reliability. This study …

papers.title_en: LTS-Net: A Lightweight and Efficient Deep Learning Framework for Automated Tuberculosis and Pneumonia Detection in Chest X-ray Images
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胸部X射线（CXR）影像中肺结核与肺炎因放射学特征重叠而难以区分的问题，提出了一种名为LTS-Net的轻量级高效深度学习框架。该框架旨在通过优化的网络结构实现对肺部疾病的自动化精准检测，在降低计算资源消耗的同时，有效提升了临床筛查的效率与准确性，为肺部疾病的辅助诊断提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Chest X-rays (CXRs) are widely utilized for screening pulmonary diseases. However,distinguishing between tuberculosis (TB) and pneumonia remains a challengingtask, as their radiological features often exhibit significant overlap. This challenge is …

papers.title_en: From Infusion to Assimilation Distillation for Medical Image Segmentation
papers.tldr: 针对SAM等大型基础模型在医学图像分割中计算开销巨大的问题，本文提出了一种从“知识注入”转向“知识同化”的新型蒸馏框架。该方法通过优化知识迁移路径，使轻量级学生模型能够更深度地吸收教师模型的表征能力。实验证明，该方法在保持模型轻量化的同时，显著提升了分割精度，为医疗设备的实时影像分析提供了高效的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Although foundation models (eg SAM) perform remarkably in medical imagesegmentation, its high computational complexity limits deployment. Knowledgedistillation (KD) allows lightweight models to inherit the representational capabilities …

papers.title_en: MIMIC-CXR-VQA: A Large-Scale LLM-Annotated Dataset and Comparative Benchmark for Medical Visual Question Answering
papers.tldr: 本研究针对临床放射学中胸部X光片（CXR）解释耗时且专家资源有限的问题，提出了MIMIC-CXR-VQA数据集。这是一个利用大语言模型（LLM）进行标注的大规模医学视觉问答数据集，并构建了相应的对比基准。该工作为自动化医学影像分析提供了重要资源，旨在提升放射科诊断效率并缓解专家短缺的压力。
papers.abstract_en: The interpretation of chest X-rays (CXRs) is a critical yet time-consuming task inclinical radiology, often limited by the availability of expert radiologists. To addressthis challenge, we introduce a new large-scale medical Visual Question Answering …

papers.title_en: Mix-to-Max: Optimizing Data Mixtures for Peak Vision-Language Efficiency
papers.tldr: 本文针对大视觉语言模型（LVLM）在视觉指令微调（VIT）过程中面临的数据冗余和高计算成本问题，提出了 Mix-to-Max 框架。该框架通过优化不同任务数据的混合比例，旨在以更低的数据成本实现更高的模型性能。研究证明，通过精细化管理数据混合，可以在显著提升训练效率的同时，保持模型在多样化视觉任务上的强大泛化能力。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Visual Instruction Tuning (VIT) endows Large Vision-Language Models(LVLMs) with powerful generalization capabilities across diverse visual tasks.However, the redundancy present in VIT data leads to substantial computational …

papers.title_en: Beyond Accuracy: An Empirical Study of Perception Stability in Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在评估中过度关注准确率而忽视稳定性这一现状，开展了深入的实证研究。通过在不同任务、领域和评估因子下测试模型的感知稳定性，揭示了现有模型在性能一致性方面的不足。该研究不仅填补了MLLM稳定性评估的空白，还为构建更可靠的多模态系统提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are predominantly compared byreporting accuracy on a collection of benchmarks, while paying much less attentionto how stable their performance is across tasks, domains, and evaluation factors …

papers.title_en: SegGuidedNet: Sub-Region-Aware Attention Supervision for Interpretable Brain Tumor Segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态MRI脑肿瘤分割中形态多变、类别不平衡及区域重叠等挑战，提出了SegGuidedNet。该模型通过引入子区域感知的注意力监督机制，增强了模型对不同肿瘤区域的特征提取能力，在提高分割精度的同时提升了模型的可解释性，为临床治疗规划提供了更可靠的辅助工具。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate segmentation of brain tumour sub-regions from multi-parametric MRI iscritical for treatment planning yet remains challenging due to morphologicalvariability, class imbalance, and overlapping appearances of tumour regions across …

papers.title_en: Stabilizing Recurrent Dynamics for Test-Time Scalable Latent Reasoning in Looped Language Models
papers.tldr: 循环语言模型（LoopLMs）通过深度递归实现高效的潜在推理，但面临测试时增加迭代次数会导致性能崩溃的不稳定问题。本文深入研究了这种递归动力学的不稳定性，并提出了一种稳定方法，使模型在推理阶段能够通过增加迭代深度持续提升性能，成功实现了测试时的可扩展性，为增强大模型的潜在推理能力提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Looped Language Models (LoopLMs) enable efficient latent reasoning throughdepth recurrence, yet exhibit unreliable test-time scaling behavior: performance oftenpeaks at a certain iteration depth and then collapses with further recurrence. Through …

papers.title_en: VisualThink-VLA: Visual Intermediate Reasoning for Effective and Low-Latency Vision-Language-Action Policies
papers.tldr: 本研究针对具身智能中的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略，指出传统的文本思维链在处理空间和视觉信息时存在局限性，容易干扰动作预测。为此，提出了 VisualThink-VLA 框架，通过引入视觉中间推理过程来增强策略的有效性。该方法在提高动作预测准确性的同时，保持了较低的推理延迟，为实现高效、精准的机器人控制提供了新的技术路径。
papers.abstract_en: Recent work has begun to equip vision-language-action (VLA) policies with explicitintermediate reasoning. In embodied control, however, textual chain-of-thought is apoor fit: irrelevant or weakly textual information can interfere with action prediction …

papers.title_en: Decomposed On-Policy Distillation for Vision-Language Reasoning: Steering Gradients for Visual Grounding
papers.tldr: 本研究针对小规模视觉语言模型在推理任务中的优化难题，提出了一种分解式同策略蒸馏方法。传统方法将模型视为整体进行蒸馏，难以有效处理多模态下的复杂动态。该方法通过分解推理过程并引导梯度流向视觉定位，增强了模型将文本推理与视觉证据关联的能力，显著提升了小模型在多模态推理任务中的表现。
papers.abstract_en: While on-policy distillation offers dense supervision for training small reasoningmodels, its optimization dynamics in the multimodal domain remain under-explored.In this work, we challenge the standard monolithic view of Vision-Language Model …

papers.title_en: When Data Is Scarce: Scaling Sparse Language Models with Repeated Training
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了在数据稀缺且需要多轮重复训练的场景下，稀疏语言模型（Sparse LLMs）的缩放定律。研究填补了现有文献中关于稀疏性与有限数据相互作用的空白，分析了模型在数据受限机制下的性能表现。通过实验，本文揭示了稀疏模型在重复训练时的扩展特性，为在有限数据资源下高效构建大规模语言模型提供了重要的理论依据和实践指导。
papers.abstract_en: Scaling laws for dense LLMs under infinite data are well explored, but how sparsityinteracts with limited data is not. In this work, we study sparse training in data-constrained regimes where limited unique tokens require multi-epoch training. Our …

papers.title_en: TRON: Targeted Rule-Verifiable Online Environments for Visual Reasoning RL
papers.tldr: 针对视觉推理强化学习中静态数据集规模有限且缺乏可控性的问题，本文提出了 TRON 框架。TRON 构建了一个目标明确且规则可验证的在线环境，能够动态生成训练信号。该方法克服了传统固定“图像-问题-答案”样本的局限性，为视觉推理任务提供了更具扩展性、可验证且可控的训练方案，显著提升了强化学习在复杂视觉逻辑任务中的表现。
papers.abstract_en: Reinforcement learning (RL) for visual reasoning needs scalable, verifiable, andcontrollable training signals. Existing visual RL post-training trains on static curateddatasets, with fixed image-question-answer samples bounded by their collection …

papers.title_en: Data-Efficient Autoregressive-to-Diffusion Language Models via On-Policy Distillation
papers.tldr: 本研究提出了一种高效的扩散语言模型（DLM）构建方法，旨在将预训练的自回归模型（ARLM）转换为扩散模型。研究者摒弃了从头开始预训练的常规做法，通过将ARLM的因果注意力替换为双向注意力，并引入同策略蒸馏（On-Policy Distillation）技术进行知识迁移。该方法显著提升了数据利用效率，在大幅减少计算资源消耗的同时，使扩散模型能够继承自回归模型的强大语言表示能力。
papers.abstract_en: We study the transformation of autoregressive models (ARLMs) into diffusionlanguage models (DLMs). Rather than pretraining from scratch, prior work replacesthe causal attention in ARLMs with bidirectional attention and then trains the …

papers.title_en: Revisiting LLM Adaptation for 3D CT Report Generation: A Study of Scaling and Diagnostic Priors
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了如何将大语言模型（LLM）有效应用于3D CT报告生成。针对医疗影像的复杂性，研究重点分析了模型规模缩放（Scaling）与引入诊断先验对生成质量的影响。通过系统的实验验证，证明了结合领域特定知识和适当的模型规模能显著提升报告的诊断准确性，为医疗多模态学习提供了重要的技术参考。
papers.abstract_en: Recent advances in multimodal learning, including large language models (LLMs)and vision-language models (VLMs), have demonstrated strong adaptability tonatural images. However, extending their use to the medical domain, particularly for …

papers.title_en: CheckMIABench: Firm Foundations For Membership Inference Attacks on Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对当前语言模型成员推理攻击（MIA）评估中存在的缺陷与不一致性，提出了 CheckMIABench 基准框架。该框架旨在为评估大型语言模型的隐私属性提供坚实基础，通过标准化的实验流程系统地分析了现有 MIA 方法的有效性。研究揭示了过往评估中的潜在偏差，并为未来开发更稳健的隐私保护机制和攻击检测技术提供了重要的参考标准。
papers.abstract_en: Membership inference attacks (MIAs) are a canonical way to assess a machinelearning model's privacy properties. Although several attempts have been made toevaluate MIAs on language models, the extant literature has suffered numerous …

papers.title_en: Fine-UNETR for PSMA PET/CT Lesion Segmentation: Automated Tumor Quantification and Overall Survival Stratification in Prostate Cancer
papers.tldr: 本研究开发了基于Vision Transformer架构的Fine-UNETR模型，旨在实现全身PSMA PET/CT影像中前列腺癌病灶的自动分割。通过该模型提取的AI肿瘤负荷生物标志物，能够有效进行肿瘤定量分析并对患者的总生存期进行风险分层，为临床决策提供了高效的自动化工具。
papers.abstract_en: Introduction: To develop and evaluate Fine-UNETR, a Vision Transformer-basedarchitecture for automated segmentation of PSMA-avid lesions on whole-bodyPET/CT, and to assess clinical utility of AI-derived tumor burden biomarkers for …

papers.title_en: Vision-language models for chest radiography do not always need the image
papers.tldr: 本研究挑战了医疗视觉语言模型（VLM）在胸部X射线诊断中具备高图像理解能力的普遍假设。作者指出，模型表现出的高准确率往往并非源于对图像特征的提取，而是利用了病症名称等文本先验信息。通过对比实验，研究揭示了仅依赖先验知识的模型也能达到类似评分，从而证明了当前评估方法的局限性，强调了在医疗AI评估中区分图像理解与文本关联的重要性。
papers.abstract_en: Medical vision-language models report strong chest radiograph accuracy, and this isincreasingly read as evidence that they use the image. That inference is unsafe: amodel exploiting finding-name priors scores like one that reads the scan, and no …
